headline: How Nvidia’s US$3.2 Billion AI Optics Pact At Corning (GLW) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: Nvidia recently agreed to invest up to US$3.20 billion in Corning through a warrant deal to expand Corning’s U.S. optical connectivity manufacturing capacity for AI data centers, deepening their collaboration on scaling high‑performance optical solutions. This partnership effectively positions Corning as a core supplier at the physical layer of AI infrastructure, tying its long-term prospects more closely to the buildout of next‑generation data centers. We’ll now examine how Nvidia’s...
